sentence: 这首单曲发布后立刻登上了排行榜。
pinyin: Zhè shǒu dānqǔ fābù hòu lìkè dēngshàng le páihángbǎng.
english: This single immediately topped the charts after its release.

sentence: 零是不是自然数，各国的规定不同。
pinyin: Líng shì bu shì zìrán shù, gè guó de guīdìng bùtóng.
english: Whether zero is a natural number differs by country's definition.

sentence: 他减少了所有非必要的开支。
pinyin: Tā jiǎnshǎo le suǒyǒu fēibìyào de kāizhī.
english: He cut back on all unnecessary expenses.

meaning: 1. to prefer; 2. to be partial to sth; 3. preference
sentence: 她对辣食有明显的偏好。
pinyin: Tā duì là shí yǒu míngxiǎn de piānhào.
english: She has a clear preference for spicy food.

meaning: 1. to work on one's own; 2. to work single-handed; 3. individual
sentence: 他辞职后决定单干，自己开公司。
pinyin: Tā cízhí hòu juédìng dāngān, zìjǐ kāi gōngsī.
english: After quitting his job, he decided to go it alone and start his own company.
